meaning: n.梳妆台,化妆师,碗柜,(医院)裹伤员
examples: Ivy leaves embellish the front of the dresser.
She pulled herself unsteadily from the bed to the dresser.
Elaine braced herself against the dresser and looked in the mirror.
Connally was known as an immaculate dresser who wore expensive and stylish suits wherever he went.
The downsizing started with her Kensington Palace staff, which she reduced to cleaner, cook, and dresser.
